summary: Kang Hyunwoo, known as Alley Boss, receives a powerful cursed ring from a companion before heading to the Arena to participate in a Battle Royale. During his stream, he dominates his opponents using a common dagger and proceeds to complete the Arena's magic and achievement evaluations. He shocks everyone by achieving a previously unknown 'Epic' grade in his evaluation, solidifying his status as a top-tier player.
key_moments: Hyunwoo receives a magic-reducing ring and discusses potential guild recruitment.
Hyunwoo enters the Battle Royale and achieves ten consecutive victories while streaming.
Hyunwoo completes the magic test and achieves the first-ever 'Epic' grade during the achievement evaluation.
